button.extend.description: Text for the continue generating button

button.more.description: Text for the more actions button

button.uploadAudios.description: Text for the button that allows users to upload references

button.download_video.description: Text for the download video button

button.download_wav.description: Text for the download WAV lossless format button

button.download_midi.description: Text for the download MIDI format button

button.get_stems.description: Text for the get stems button

button.concat_music.description: Text for the concatenate music button

button.download_audio.description: Text for the download music button

button.remaster.description: Text for the remaster button to enhance audio quality

button.replace_section.description: Text for the button to replace a section in the song

button.mashup.description: Text for the mashup multiple songs button

button.generate_lyrics.description: Text for the button to automatically generate lyrics using AI

button.optimize_style.description: Text for the button to optimize style using AI

button.all_stems.description: Text for the button to separate all tracks

name.style.description: Prompt for song style content input

name.title.description: Prompt for song title content input

name.weirdness.description: Control the level of creativity in generated music

name.styleInfluence.description: Control the influence of style on the generated result

name.variationCategory.description: Control the diversity of generated variations

name.audioWeight.description: Weight of the original track's influence when covering

name.replaceSection.description: Replace a section in the song

description.prompt.message: Describe the music style and theme you want

description.lyrics.message: Enter custom lyrics, supporting paragraph markers like [Verse], [Chorus], [Bridge], etc.

description.style.message: Describe music styles, such as acoustic pop, jazz, electronic

description.styleNegative.message: Describe unwanted styles, such as heavy metal, screaming
description.styleNegative.description: Description for the exclusion style parameter

description.uploadAudios.message: Upload music as a reference for generation. The upload process may take some time, and generation will occur based on the uploaded music once successful.
description.uploadAudios.description: Description for the upload reference parameter

description.vocalGender.message: Select the gender of the generated vocals (only supported in v4.5 and above)
description.vocalGender.description: Description for the vocal gender selector

description.weirdness.message: Higher values result in more creative and experimental music (0-100)

description.styleInfluence.message: Higher values increase the influence of style tags on the generation result (0-100)
description.styleInfluence.description: Description for the style influence parameter

description.audioWeight.message: Weight of the original song's influence on the result during cover (0-100)
description.audioWeight.description: Description for the original song weight parameter

description.lyricPrompt.message: Enter a lyric description, and the AI will automatically generate lyrics

description.replaceSection.message: Replace content in the specified time section of the song
description.replaceSection.description: Description for the replace section feature

placeholder.prompt.message: Describe the music you want, e.g., a warm folk song about autumn nostalgia...

placeholder.lyrics.message:
[Verse]
In this quiet night
Stars twinkle in the sky

[Chorus]
Let's sing together
Until dawn...

placeholder.extend.lyrics.message: Enter the lyrics to be extended...

placeholder.extend.continue_at.description: Placeholder for the start time of extension

placeholder.style.message: For example: acoustic pop, jazz, R&B, electronic...

placeholder.lyricPrompt.message: Describe the theme of the lyrics, and the AI will generate automatically...

placeholder.replaceSectionStart.description: Placeholder for the start time of the replace section

placeholder.replaceSectionEnd.description: Placeholder for the end time of the replace section

message.startingTask.description: Message when starting the music generation task

message.startingUploadAudio.description: Message when starting the music upload

message.uploadReferencesExceed.message: Uploaded music exceeds the maximum number
message.uploadReferencesExceed.description: Error message when uploaded music exceeds the maximum number

message.uploadReferencesError.description: Error message when music upload fails

message.startTaskSuccess.message: Successfully started the music generation task
message.startTaskSuccess.description: Success message when the music generation task starts successfully

message.startUploadAudioSuccess.description: Success message when custom music is uploaded successfully

message.startUploadAudioFailed.description: Error message when starting the music generation task fails

message.startTaskFailed.message: Failed to start the music generation task
message.startTaskFailed.description: Error message when starting the music generation task fails

message.getVideoUrlFailed.message: Failed to get music video, please try again later
message.getVideoUrlFailed.description: Error message when getting video fails

message.generateLyricsSuccess.description: Message when lyrics are generated successfully

message.optimizeStyleSuccess.description: Message when style optimization is successful

message.fetchWavFailed.description: Message when fetching WAV file fails

message.fetchMidiFailed.description: Message when fetching MIDI file fails

message.generating.description: Message while music is being generated

message.noOperations.description: Message when there are no available operations

message.noTasks.message: No history tasks, please generate music in the left configuration panel
message.noTasks.description: Message when there are no tasks
